_description: Ordered routing rules for auto-assigning new models to providers. First match wins. Used by discover_models.py when adding new models to the registry.

rules._note: Anthropic models route to Claude CLI (subscription). CLI uses short aliases.
OpenAI models route to Codex CLI (subscription). CLI uses model names without prefix.
Google models route to Google Generative AI API (supports thinkingLevel + grounding).
Moonshot/Kimi models route to Kimi CLI (subscription).
Everything else routes to OpenRouter (OpenAI-compatible API). Catch-all fallback.
